chapters.title: The Statement of Allah: "Fight you the leaders of disbelief (chiefs of Quraish - Mushrikün of Makkah) for surely their oaths are nothing to them..." (V.<qref chapter="9" verses="12">9:12</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="9" verses="12">{‏فَقَاتِلُوا أَئِمَّةَ الْكُفْرِ إِنَّهُمْ لاَ أَيْمَانَ لَهُمْ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah: "...And those who hoard up gold and silver (AI-Kanz—the money, the Zakãt of which has not been paid) and spend it not in the Way of Allah—announce to them a painful torment." (V.<qref chapter="9" verses="34">9:34</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="9" verses="34">{‏وَالَّذِينَ يَكْنِزُونَ الذَّهَبَ وَالْفِضَّةَ وَلاَ يُنْفِقُونَهَا فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ فَبَشِّرْهُمْ بِعَذَابٍ أَلِيمٍ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah "On the Day when that (Al-Kanz—money gold and silver, etc., the Zakät of which has not been paid) will be heated in the fire of Hell, and with it will be branded their foreheads…" (V.<qref chapter="9" verses="35">9:35</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ ‏<qref chapter="9" verses="35">{‏يَوْمَ يُحْمَى عَلَيْهَا فِي نَارِ جَهَنَّمَ فَتُكْوَى بِهَا جِبَاهُهُمْ وَجُنُوبُهُمْ وَظُهُورُهُمْ هَذَا مَا كَنَزْتُمْ لأَنْفُسِكُمْ فَذُوقُوا مَا كُنْتُمْ تَكْنِزُونَ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah: "Verily, the number of months with Allah is twelve months (in a year) so was it ordained by Allah on the Day when He created the heavens and the earth; of them four are sacred, (i.e., the 1st, the 7th, the 11th, and the 12th months of the Islamic calendar). That is the right religion; so wrong not yourself therein.. ." (V.<qref chapter="9" verses="36">9:36</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="9" verses="36">{‏إِنَّ عِدَّةَ الشُّهُورِ عِنْدَ اللَّهِ اثْنَا عَشَرَ شَهْرًا فِي كِتَابِ اللَّهِ يَوْمَ خَلَقَ السَّمَوَاتِ وَالأَرْضَ مِنْهَا أَرْبَعَةٌ حُرُمٌ‏}</qref>‏ ‏{‏الْقَيِّمُ‏}‏ هُوَ الْقَائِمُ‏.‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah: “...The second of two, when they (Muhammad ﷺ and Abü Bakr were in the cave, and he ﷺ said to his companion (Abu Bakr ) ‘Be not sad (or afraid), surely Allah is with us.'" (V.<qref chapter="9" verses="40">9:40</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="9" verses="40">{‏ثَانِيَ اثْنَيْنِ إِذْ هُمَا فِي الْغَارِ‏}</qref>‏
chapters.intro_arabic: {مَعَنَا} نَاصِرُنَا السَّكِينَةُ فَعِيلَةٌ مِنَ السُّكُونِ.

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah "...And (for) to attract the hearts of those who have been inclined (towards Islam) ; and to free the captives..." (V.<qref chapter="9" verses="60">9:60</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="9" verses="60">{‏وَالْمُؤَلَّفَةِ قُلُوبُهُمْ‏}</qref>‏
chapters.intro_arabic: قَالَ مُجَاهِدٌ يَتَأَلَّفُهُمْ بِالْعَطِيَّةِ.

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah "Those who defame such of the believers who give charity (in Allah's Cause) voluntarily..." (V.<qref chapter="9" verses="79">9:79</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="9" verses="79">{‏الَّذِينَ يَلْمِزُونَ الْمُطَّوِّعِينَ مِنَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ‏}</qref>‏
chapters.intro_arabic: <qref chapter="9" verses="79">{يَلْمِزُونَ}</qref> يَعِيبُونَ، وَجُهْدَهُمْ وَجَهْدَهُمْ طَاقَتَهُمْ.

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah 'Whether you (O Muhammad ﷺ ask forgiveness for them (hypocrites) or ask not forgiveness for them - (and even) if you ask seventy times for their forgiveness – Allah will not forgive them..." (V.<qref chapter="9" verses="80">9:80</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="9" verses="80">{‏اسْتَغْفِرْ لَهُمْ أَوْ لاَ تَسْتَغْفِرْ لَهُمْ إِنْ تَسْتَغْفِرْ لَهُمْ سَبْعِينَ مَرَّةً‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah: 'And never (O Muhammad ﷺ ) pray (funeral prayer) for any of them (hypocrites) who dies, nor stand at his grave." (V.<qref chapter="9" verses="84">9:84</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="9" verses="84">{‏وَلاَ تُصَلِّ عَلَى أَحَدٍ مِنْهُمْ مَاتَ أَبَدًا وَلاَ تَقُمْ عَلَى قَبْرِهِ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah: "They will swear by Allah to you (Muslims) when you return to them, that you may turn away from them..." (V.<qref chapter="9" verses="95">9:95</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="9" verses="95">{‏سَيَحْلِفُونَ بِاللَّهِ لَكُمْ إِذَا انْقَلَبْتُمْ إِلَيْهِمْ لِتُعْرِضُوا عَنْهُمْ فَأَعْرِضُوا عَنْهُمْ إِنَّهُمْ رِجْسٌ وَمَأْوَاهُمْ جَهَنَّمُ جَزَاءً بِمَا كَانُوا يَكْسِبُونَ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah "And (there are) others who have acknowledged their sins..." (V.<qref chapter="9" verses="102">9:102</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="9" verses="102">{‏وَآخَرُونَ اعْتَرَفُوا بِذُنُوبِهِمْ خَلَطُوا عَمَلاً صَالِحًا وَآخَرَ سَيِّئًا عَسَى اللَّهُ أَنْ يَتُوبَ عَلَيْهِمْ إِنَّ اللَّهَ غَفُورٌ رَحِيمٌ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah "It is not (proper) for the Prophet (ﷺ) and those who believe to ask for Allah's forgiveness for the Mushrikun [polytheists, pagans, idolaters, and disbelievers in the Oneness of Allah and in His Messenger Muhammad ﷺ] . . ."(V.<qref chapter="9" verses="113">9 :113</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="9" verses="113">{‏مَا كَانَ لِلنَّبِيِّ وَالَّذِينَ آمَنُوا أَنْ يَسْتَغْفِرُوا لِلْمُشْرِكِينَ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah "Allah has forgiven the Prophet, the Muhãjirun and the Ansãr...' (V.<qref chapter="9" verses="117">9:117</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="9" verses="117">{‏لَقَدْ تَابَ اللَّهُ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ وَالْمُهَاجِرِينَ وَالأَنْصَارِ الَّذِينَ اتَّبَعُوهُ فِي سَاعَةِ الْعُسْرَةِ مِنْ بَعْدِ مَا كَادَ يَزِيغُ قُلُوبُ فَرِيقٍ مِنْهُمْ ثُمَّ تَابَ عَلَيْهِمْ إِنَّهُ بِهِمْ رَءُوفٌ رَحِيمٌ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: And (He did forgive also) the three [who did not join the Tabuk expedition] till for them the earth, vast as it is, was straitened..." (V.<qref chapter="9" verses="118">9:118</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="9" verses="118">{‏وَعَلَى الثَّلاَثَةِ الَّذِينَ خُلِّفُوا حَتَّى إِذَا ضَاقَتْ عَلَيْهِمُ الأَرْضُ بِمَا رَحُبَتْ وَضَاقَتْ عَلَيْهِمْ أَنْفُسُهُمْ وَظَنُّوا أَنْ لاَ مَلْجَأَ مِنَ اللَّهِ إِلاَّ إِلَيْهِ ثُمَّ تَابَ عَلَيْهِمْ لِيَتُوبُوا إِنَّ اللَّهَ هُوَ التَّوَّابُ الرَّحِيمُ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: "O you who believe! Be afraid of Allah, and be with those who are true (in words and deeds) ." (V.<qref chapter="9" verses="119">9:119</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="9" verses="119">{‏يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا اتَّقُوا اللَّهَ وَكُونُوا مَعَ الصَّادِقِينَ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah "Verily, there has come unto you a Messenger (Muhammad ﷺ) from amongst yourselves (i.e., whom you know well). It grieves him that you should receive any injury or difficulty..." (V.<qref chapter="9" verses="128">9:128</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="9" verses="128">{‏لَقَدْ جَاءَكُمْ رَسُولٌ مِنْ أَنْفُسِكُمْ عَزِيزٌ عَلَيْهِ مَا عَنِتُّمْ حَرِيصٌ عَلَيْكُمْ بِالْمُؤْمِنِينَ رَءُوفٌ رَحِيمٌ‏}</qref>‏ مِنَ الرَّأْفَةِ
بَابٌ
chapters.intro_arabic:
وَقَالَ ابْنُ عَبَّاسٍ: {فَاخْتَلَطَ} فَنَبَتَ بِالْمَاءِ مِنْ كُلِّ لَوْنٍ. وَ{قَالُوا اتَّخَذَ اللَّهُ وَلَدًا سُبْحَانَهُ هُوَ الْغَنِيُّ}.
وَقَالَ زَيْدُ بْنُ أَسْلَمَ: {أَنَّ لَهُمْ قَدَمَ صِدْقٍ} مُحَمَّدٌ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ وَقَالَ مُجَاهِدٌ خَيْرٌ. يُقَالُ: {تِلْكَ آيَاتُ} يَعْنِي هَذِهِ أَعْلاَمُ الْقُرْآنِ وَمِثْلُهُ.
{حَتَّى إِذَا كُنْتُمْ فِي الْفُلْكِ وَجَرَيْنَ بِهِمْ} الْمَعْنَى بِكُمْ.
{دَعْوَاهُمْ} دُعَاؤُهُمْ {أُحِيطَ بِهِمْ} دَنَوْا مِنَ الْهَلَكَةِ {أَحَاطَتْ بِهِ خَطِيئَتُهُ} فَاتَّبَعَهُمْ وَأَتْبَعَهُمْ وَاحِدٌ.
{عَدْوًا} مِنَ الْعُدْوَانِ.
وَقَالَ مُجَاهِدٌ: {يُعَجِّلُ اللَّهُ لِلنَّاسِ الشَّرَّ اسْتِعْجَالَهُمْ بِالْخَيْرِ} قَوْلُ الإِنْسَانِ لِوَلَدِهِ وَمَالِهِ إِذَا غَضِبَ اللَّهُمَّ لاَ تُبَارِكْ فِيهِ وَالْعَنْهُ {لَقُضِيَ إِلَيْهِمْ أَجَلُهُمْ} لأُهْلِكُ مَنْ دُعِيَ عَلَيْهِ وَلأَمَاتَهُ.
{لِلَّذِينَ أَحْسَنُوا الْحُسْنَى} مِثْلُهَا حُسْنَى {وَزِيَادَةٌ} مَغْفِرَةٌ.
{الْكِبْرِيَاءُ} الْمُلْكُ.

chapters.title: "And We took the Children of Israel across the sea, and Fir'aun (Pharaoh) and his hosts followed them in oppression and enmity, till when the drowning overtook him, he said, 'I believe that La ilaha jib (Huwa) (none has the right to be worshipped but) He (Allah), in Whom the Children of IsrAel believe, and I am one of the Muslims (those who submit to Allah's Will)." (V.<qref chapter="10" verses="90">10:90</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="10" verses="90">{‏وَجَاوَزْنَا بِبَنِي إِسْرَائِيلَ الْبَحْرَ فَأَتْبَعَهُمْ فِرْعَوْنُ وَجُنُودُهُ بَغْيًا وَعَدْوًا حَتَّى إِذَا أَدْرَكَهُ الْغَرَقُ قَالَ آمَنْتُ أَنَّهُ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ الَّذِي آمَنَتْ بِهِ بَنُو إِسْرَائِيلَ وَأَنَا مِنَ الْمُسْلِمِينَ‏}</qref>‏
chapters.intro_arabic: <qref chapter="10" verses="92">{نُنَجِّيكَ}</qref> نُلْقِيكَ عَلَى نَجْوَةٍ مِنَ الأَرْضِ، وَهْوَ النَّشَزُ الْمَكَانُ الْمُرْتَفِعُ.

chapters.title: "No doubt! They did fold up their breasts, that they may hide from Him. Surely, even when they cover themselves with their garments, He knows what they conceal and what they reveal. Verily, He is the All-Knower of the (innermost secrets) of the breasts." (V.<qref chapter="11" verses="5">11:5</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="11" verses="5">{‏أَلاَ إِنَّهُمْ يَثْنُونَ صُدُورَهُمْ لِيَسْتَخْفُوا مِنْهُ أَلاَ حِينَ يَسْتَغْشُونَ ثِيَابَهُمْ يَعْلَمُ مَا يُسِرُّونَ وَمَا يُعْلِنُونَ إِنَّهُ عَلِيمٌ بِذَاتِ الصُّدُور‏}</qref>‏
chapters.intro_arabic:
وَقَالَ غَيْرُهُ: {وَحَاقَ} نَزَلَ، يَحِيقُ يَنْزِلُ. يَئُوسٌ فَعُولٌ مِنْ يَئِسْتُ.
وَقَالَ مُجَاهِدٌ: {تَبْتَئِسْ} تَحْزَنْ.
{يَثْنُونَ صُدُورَهُمْ} شَكٌّ وَامْتِرَاءٌ فِي الْحَقِّ.
{لِيَسْتَخْفُوا مِنْهُ} مِنَ اللَّهِ إِنِ اسْتَطَاعُوا.

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah: "...And His Throne was on the water..." (V.<qref chapter="11" verses="7">11:7</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="11" verses="7">{‏وَكَانَ عَرْشُهُ عَلَى الْمَاءِ‏}</qref>

chapters.title: "And to the Madyan (Midian) people (We sent) their brother Shu'aib." (<qref chapter="11" verses="84">11:84</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="7" verses="85">{‏وَإِلَى مَدْيَنَ أَخَاهُمْ شُعَيْبًا‏}</qref>
chapters.intro_arabic:
إِلَى أَهْلِ مَدْيَنَ لأَنَّ مَدْيَنَ بَلَدٌ، وَمِثْلُهُ: {وَاسْأَلِ الْقَرْيَةَ} وَاسْأَلِ {الْعِيرَ} يَعْنِي أَهْلَ الْقَرْيَةِ {وَأَصْحَابَ} الْعِيرِ {وَرَاءَكُمْ ظِهْرِيًّا} يَقُولُ لَمْ تَلْتَفِتُوا إِلَيْهِ، وَيُقَالُ إِذَا لَمْ يَقْضِ الرَّجُلُ حَاجَتَهُ ظَهَرْتَ بِحَاجَتِي وَجَعَلْتَنِي ظِهْرِيًّا، وَالظِّهْرِيُّ هَاهُنَا أَنْ تَأْخُذَ مَعَكَ دَابَّةً أَوْ وِعَاءً تَسْتَظْهِرُ بِهِ.
{أَرَاذِلُنَا} سُقَاطُنَا.
{إِجْرَامِي} هُوَ مَصْدَرٌ مِنْ أَجْرَمْتُ وَبَعْضُهُمْ يَقُولُ جَرَمْتُ.
الْفُلْكُ وَالْفَلَكُ وَاحِدٌ وَهْيَ السَّفِينَةُ وَالسُّفُنُ.
{مُجْرَاهَا} مَدْفَعُهَا وَهْوَ مَصْدَرُ أَجْرَيْتُ، وَأَرْسَيْتُ حَبَسْتُ وَيُقْرَأُ: {مَرْسَاهَا} مِنْ رَسَتْ هِيَ، وَ{مَجْرَاهَا} مِنْ جَرَتْ هِيَ وَ{مُجْرِيهَا وَمُرْسِيهَا} مِنْ فُعِلَ بِهَا، الرَّاسِيَاتُ ثَابِتَاتٌ.

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah:"...The witnesses will say, 'These are the ones who lied..." (V.<qref chapter="11" verses="18">11:18</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="11" verses="18">{‏وَيَقُولُ الأَشْهَادُ هَؤُلاَءِ الَّذِينَ كَذَبُوا عَلَى رَبِّهِمْ أَلاَ لَعْنَةُ اللَّهِ عَلَى الظَّالِمِينَ‏}</qref>‏
chapters.intro_arabic: وَاحِدُ الأَشْهَادِ شَاهِدٌ مِثْلُ صَاحِبٍ وَأَصْحَابٍ‏.‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah: "Such is the Seizure of your Lord when He seizes the (population of) towns while they are doing wrong. Verily, His Seizure is painful and severe." (V.<qref chapter="11" verses="102">11:102</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="11" verses="102">{‏وَكَذَلِكَ أَخْذُ رَبِّكَ إِذَا أَخَذَ الْقُرَى وَهِيَ ظَالِمَةٌ إِنَّ أَخْذَهُ أَلِيمٌ شَدِيدٌ‏}</qref>‏
chapters.intro_arabic:
‏{‏الرِّفْدُ الْمَرْفُودُ‏}‏ الْعَوْنُ الْمُعِينُ‏.‏ رَفَدْتُهُ أَعَنْتُهُ ‏{‏تَرْكَنُوا‏}‏ تَمِيلُوا ‏{‏فَلَوْلاَ كَانَ‏}‏ فَهَلاَّ كَانَ ‏{‏أُتْرِفُوا‏}‏ أُهْلِكُوا‏.‏


وَقَالَ ابْنُ عَبَّاسٍ ‏{‏زَفِيرٌ وَشَهِيقٌ‏}‏ شَدِيدٌ وَصَوْتٌ ضَعِيفٌ‏.‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah: "And perform As-Salat (Iqa ma as-SaIãt)" at the two ends of the day, and in some hours of the night; [i.e ., five compulsory Salãt (prayers)]. Verily, the good deeds remove the evil deeds (small sins)…" ('V.<qref chapter="11" verses="114">11 :114</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏{‏وَأَقِمِ الصَّلاَةَ طَرَفَىِ النَّهَارِ وَزُلَفًا مِنَ اللَّيْلِ إِنَّ الْحَسَنَاتِ يُذْهِبْنَ السَّيِّئَاتِ ذَلِكَ ذِكْرَى لِلذَّاكِرِينَ‏}‏
chapters.intro_arabic: {وَزُلَفًا} سَاعَاتٍ بَعْدَ سَاعَاتٍ وَمِنْهُ سُمِّيَتِ الْمُزْدَلِفَةُ الزُّلَفُ مَنْزِلَةٌ بَعْدَ مَنْزِلَةٍ وَأَمَّا زُلْفَى فَمَصْدَرٌ مِنَ الْقُرْبَى، ازْدَلَفُوا اجْتَمَعُوا <qref chapter="26" verses="64">{أَزْلَفْنَا}</qref> جَمَعْنَا.

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah: "...and perfect His Favour on you and on the offspring of Ya'qub (Jacob)..." (V.<qref chapter="12" verses="6">12:6</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="12" verses="6">{‏وَيُتِمُّ نِعْمَتَهُ عَلَيْكَ وَعَلَى آلِ يَعْقُوبَ كَمَا أَتَمَّهَا عَلَى أَبَوَيْكَ مِنْ قَبْلُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَإِسْحَاقَ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah: "Verily, in Yusuf (Joseph) and his brethren, there were Ayat (proofs, evidences, verses, lessons, signs, revelations, etc.) for those who ask." (V.<qref chapter="12" verses="7">12:7</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="12" verses="7">{‏لَقَدْ كَانَ فِي يُوسُفَ وَإِخْوَتِهِ آيَاتٌ لِلسَّائِلِينَ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah "He said, 'Nay, but your ownselves have made up a tale. So (for me), patience is most fitting. And it is Allah (Alone) Whose help can be sought against that (lie) which you describe." (V.<qref chapter="12" verses="18">12:18</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="12" verses="18">{‏قَالَ بَلْ سَوَّلَتْ لَكُمْ أَنْفُسُكُمْ أَمْرًا‏}</qref>‏ ‏{‏سَوَّلَتْ‏}‏ زَيَّنَتْ

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah: "And she, in whose house he was, sought to seduce him (to do an evil act). She closed the doors and said, 'Come on, O you.' He said: 'I seek refuge in Allah (or Allah forbid)'..." (V.<qref chapter="12" verses="23">12:23</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="12" verses="23">{‏وَرَاوَدَتْهُ الَّتِي هُوَ فِي بَيْتِهَا عَنْ نَفْسِهِ وَغَلَّقَتِ الأَبْوَابَ وَقَالَتْ هَيْتَ لَكَ‏}</qref>‏
chapters.intro_arabic:
وَقَالَ عِكْرِمَةُ هَيْتَ لَكَ بِالْحَوْرَانِيَّةِ هَلُمَّ.


وَقَالَ ابْنُ جُبَيْرٍ تَعَالَهْ.

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah: "But when the messenger came to him, [Yusuf (Joseph)] said, 'Return to your lord..(up to).. the women said: Allah forbid." (V.<qref chapter="12" verses="50,51">12:50,51</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ <qref chapter="12" verses="50-51">‏{‏فَلَمَّا جَاءَهُ الرَّسُولُ قَالَ ارْجِعْ إِلَى رَبِّكَ فَاسْأَلْهُ مَا بَالُ النِّسْوَةِ اللاَّتِي قَطَّعْنَ أَيْدِيَهُنَّ إِنَّ رَبِّي بِكَيْدِهِنَّ عَلِيمٌ * قَالَ مَا خَطْبُكُنَّ إِذْ رَاوَدْتُنَّ يُوسُفَ عَنْ نَفْسِهِ قُلْنَ حَاشَى لِلَّهِ‏}‏</qref>
chapters.intro_arabic: وَحَاشَ وَحَاشَى تَنْزِيهٌ وَاسْتِثْنَاءٌ ‏{‏حَصْحَصَ‏}‏ وَضَحَ‏.‏

chapters.title: "(They were reprieved) until, when the Messengers gave up hope..." (V.<qref chapter="12" verses="110">12:110</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="12" verses="110">{‏حَتَّى إِذَا اسْتَيْأَسَ الرُّسُلُ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah: "Allah knows what every female bears, and by how much the wombs fall short (of their time or number)..." (V.<qref chapter="13" verses="8">13:8</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="13" verses="8">{‏اللَّهُ يَعْلَمُ مَا تَحْمِلُ كُلُّ أُنْثَى وَمَا تَغِيضُ الأَرْحَامُ‏}</qref>‏
chapters.intro_arabic: غِيضَ: نُقِصَ

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah "... As a goodly tree, whose root is firmly fixed..." (V.<qref chapter="14" verses="24">14:24</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="14" verses="24-25">{‏كَشَجَرَةٍ طَيِّبَةٍ أَصْلُهَا ثَابِتٌ وَفَرْعُهَا فِي السَّمَاءِ * تُؤْتِي أُكْلَهَا كُلَّ حِينٍ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: "Allah will keep firm those who believe with, the word that stands firm..." (V.<qref chapter="14" verses="27">14:27</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="14" verses="27">{‏يُثَبِّتُ اللَّهُ الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا بِالْقَوْلِ الثَّابِتِ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: "Have you not seen those who have changed the Blessings of Allah into disbelief?..." (V.<qref chapter="14" verses="28">14:28</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="14" verses="28">{‏أَلَمْ تَرَ إِلَى الَّذِينَ بَدَّلُوا نِعْمَةَ اللَّهِ كُفْرًا‏}</qref>‏
chapters.intro_arabic: {أَلَمْ تَرَ} أَلَمْ تَعْلَمْ كَقَوْلِهِ: <qref chapter="2" verses="243">{أَلَمْ تَرَ إِلَى الَّذِينَ خَرَجُوا}</qref> الْبَوَارُ الْهَلاَكُ، بَارَ يَبُورُ بَوْرًا {قَوْمًا بُورًا} هَالِكِينَ.

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah: "Except him (devil) that gains hearing by stealing, he is pursued by a clear flaming fire." (V.<qref chapter="15" verses="18">15:18</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="15" verses="18">{‏إِلاَّ مَنِ اسْتَرَقَ السَّمْعَ فَأَتْبَعَهُ شِهَابٌ مُبِينٌ‏}</qref>

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah: "And verily, the dwellers of AI-Hijr (Rocky Tract, i.e., Thamud people) denied the Messengers." (V.<qref chapter="15" verses="80">15:80</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="15" verses="80">{‏وَلَقَدْ كَذَّبَ أَصْحَابُ الْحِجْرِ الْمُرْسَلِينَ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah "And indeed, We have bestowed upon you seven Al-Mathãni (i.e., seven repeatedly recited Verses i.e., Sürat AI-Fatiha) and the Grand Qur'an." (V.<qref chapter="15" verses="87">15:87</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="15" verses="87">{‏وَلَقَدْ آتَيْنَاكَ سَبْعًا مِنَ الْمَثَانِي وَالْقُرْآنَ الْعَظِيمَ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah "Who have made the Qur'an into parts (i.e., believed in one part and disbelieved in the other) ." (V.<qref chapter="15" verses="91">15:91</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="15" verses="91">{‏الَّذِينَ جَعَلُوا الْقُرْآنَ عِضِينَ‏}</qref>‏
chapters.intro_arabic:
{الْمُقْتَسِمِينَ} الَّذِينَ حَلَفُوا وَمِنْهُ: {لاَ أُقْسِمُ} أَيْ أُقْسِمُ وَتُقْرَأُ لأُقْسِمُ.
{قَاسَمَهُمَا} حَلَفَ لَهُمَا وَلَمْ يَحْلِفَا لَهُ.
وَقَالَ مُجَاهِدٌ: {تَقَاسَمُوا} تَحَالَفُوا.

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah: "And worship your Lord until there comes unto you the certainty (i.e., death)." (V.<qref chapter="15" verses="99">15:99</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="15" verses="99">{‏وَاعْبُدْ رَبَّكَ حَتَّى يَأْتِيَكَ الْيَقِين‏}</qref>
chapters.intro_arabic: قَالَ سَالِمٌ: {الْيَقِينُ} الْمَوْتُ.

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "...And of you there are some who are sent back to senility..." (V.<qref chapter="16" verses="70">16:70</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="16" verses="70">{‏وَمِنْكُمْ مَنْ يُرَدُّ إِلَى أَرْذَلِ الْعُمُرِ‏}</qref>‏
باب

chapters.title: "And we decreed for the Children of Israel." (<qref chapter="17" verses="4">17:4</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: ‏<qref chapter="17" verses="4">{‏وَقَضَيْنَا إِلَى بَنِي إِسْرَائِيلَ‏}</qref>
chapters.intro_arabic: أَخْبَرْنَاهُمْ أَنَّهُمْ سَيُفْسِدُونَ، وَالْقَضَاءُ عَلَى وُجُوهٍ <qref chapter="17" verses="23">{وَقَضَى رَبُّكَ}</qref> أَمَرَ رَبُّكَ، وَمِنْهُ الْحُكْمُ: {إِنَّ رَبَّكَ يَقْضِي بَيْنَهُمْ}، وَمِنْهُ الْخَلْقُ: <qref chapter="41" verses="12">{فَقَضَاهُنَّ سَبْعَ سَمَوَاتٍ}</qref>.{نَفِيرًا} مَنْ يَنْفِرُ مَعَهُ.<qref chapter="17" verses="7">{وَلِيُتَبِّرُوا}</qref> يُدَمِّرُوا <qref chapter="17" verses="7">{مَا عَلَوْا}</qref>.{حَصِيرًا} مَحْبِسًا مَحْصَرًا {حَقَّ} وَجَبَ {مَيْسُورًا} لَيِّنًا.{خِطْئًا} إِثْمًا، وَهْوَ اسْمٌ مِنْ خَطِئْتُ، وَالْخَطَأُ مَفْتُوحٌ مَصْدَرُهُ مِنَ الإِثْمِ، خَطِئْتُ بِمَعْنَى أَخْطَأْتُ.<qref chapter="17" verses="37">{تَخْرِقَ}</qref> تَقْطَعَ.<qref chapter="17" verses="47">{وَإِذْ هُمْ نَجْوَى}</qref> مَصْدَرٌ مِنْ نَاجَيْتُ، فَوَصَفَهُمْ بِهَا، وَالْمَعْنَى يَتَنَاجَوْنَ {رُفَاتًا} حُطَامًا <qref chapter="17" verses="64">{وَاسْتَفْزِزْ}</qref> اسْتَخِفَّ <qref chapter="17" verses="64">{بِخَيْلِكَ}</qref> الْفُرْسَانِ، وَالرَّجْلُ الرَّجَّالَةُ وَاحِدُهَا رَاجِلٌ مِثْلُ صَاحِبٍ وَصَحْبٍ، وَتَاجِرٍ وَتَجْرٍ.{حَاصِبًا} الرِّيحُ الْعَاصِفُ، وَالْحَاصِبُ أَيْضًا مَا تَرْمِي بِهِ الرِّيحُ وَمِنْهُ: <qref chapter="21" verses="98">{حَصَبُ جَهَنَّمَ}</qref> يُرْمَى بِهِ فِي جَهَنَّمَ، وَهْوَ حَصَبُهَا، وَيُقَالُ حَصَبَ فِي الأَرْضِ ذَهَبَ، وَالْحَصَبُ مُشْتَقٌّ مِنَ الْحَصْبَاءِ وَالْحِجَارَةِ.{تَارَةً} مَرَّةً وَجَمَاعَتُهُ تِيَرَةٌ وَتَارَاتٌ <qref chapter="17" verses="62">{لأَحْتَنِكَنَّ}</qref> لأَسْتَأْصِلَنَّهُمْ يُقَالُ احْتَنَكَ فُلاَنٌ مَا عِنْدَ فُلاَنٍ مِنْ عِلْمٍ اسْتَقْصَاهُ.<qref chapter="17" verses="13">{طَائِرَهُ}</qref> حَظُّهُ. قَالَ ابْنُ عَبَّاسٍ كُلُّ سُلْطَانٍ فِي الْقُرْآنِ فَهُوَ حُجَّةٌ.{وَلِيٌّ مِنَ الذُّلِّ} لَمْ يُحَالِفْ أَحَدًا.

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "Glorified (and Exalted) is He (Allah) [above all that (evil) they associate with Him], Who took His slave (Muḥammad pbuh) for a Journey by Night from Al-Masjid-al-Ḥarām (at Makkah) to Al-Masjid-al-Aqsā (in Jerusalem)..." (V.<qref chapter="17" verses="1">17:1</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="17" verses="1">{‏أَسْرَى بِعَبْدِهِ لَيْلاً مِنَ الْمَسْجِدِ الْحَرَامِ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Most High: "And indeed, We have honoured the Children of Adam..." (V.<qref chapter="17" verses="70">17:70</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ تَعَالَى ‏<qref chapter="17" verses="70">{‏وَلَقَدْ كَرَّمْنَا بَنِي آدَمَ‏}</qref>
chapters.intro_arabic:
{كَرَّمْنَا} وَأَكْرَمْنَا وَاحِدٌ {ضِعْفَ الْحَيَاةِ} عَذَابَ الْحَيَاةِ وَعَذَابَ الْمَمَاتِ {خِلاَفَكَ} وَخَلْفَكَ سَوَاءٌ {وَنَأَى} تَبَاعَدَ {شَاكِلَتِهِ} نَاحِيَتِهِ، وَهْيَ مِنْ شَكْلِهِ {صَرَّفْنَا} وَجَّهْنَا {قَبِيلاً} مُعَايَنَةً وَمُقَابَلَةً، وَقِيلَ الْقَابِلَةُ لأَنَّهَا مُقَابِلَتُهَا وَتَقْبَلُ وَلَدَهَا {خَشْيَةَ الإِنْفَاقِ} أَنْفَقَ الرَّجُلُ أَمْلَقَ، وَنَفِقَ الشَّيْءُ ذَهَبَ {قَتُورًا} مُقَتِّرًا.
{لِلأَذْقَانِ} مُجْتَمَعُ اللَّحْيَيْنِ، وَالْوَاحِدُ ذَقَنٌ.
وَقَالَ مُجَاهِدٌ: {مَوْفُورًا} وَافِرًا {تَبِيعًا} ثَائِرًا، وَقَالَ ابْنُ عَبَّاسٍ نَصِيرًا.
{خَبَتْ} طَفِئَتْ.
وَقَالَ ابْنُ عَبَّاسٍ: {لاَ تُبَذِّرْ} لاَ تُنْفِقْ فِي الْبَاطِلِ {ابْتِغَاءَ رَحْمَةٍ} رِزْقٍ {مَثْبُورًا} مَلْعُونًا {لاَ تَقْفُ} لاَ تَقُلْ {فَجَاسُوا} تَيَمَّمُوا. يُزْجِي الْفُلْكَ يُجْرِي الْفُلْكَ {يَخِرُّونَ لِلأَذْقَانِ} لِلْوُجُوهِ.

chapters.title: "And when We decide to destroy a town (population), We (first) send a definite order (to obey Allāh and be righteous) to those among them [or We (first) increase in number those of its population] who lead a life of luxury. Then they transgress therein..." (V.<qref chapter="17" verses="16">17:16</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="17" verses="2">{‏إِذَا أَرَدْنَا أَنْ نُهْلِكَ قَرْيَةً أَمَرْنَا مُتْرَفِيهَا‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: "O offspring of those whom We carried (in the ship) with Nūh (Noah)! Verily, he was a grateful slave." (V.<qref chapter="17" verses="3">17:3</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="17" verses="3">{‏ذُرِّيَّةَ مَنْ حَمَلْنَا مَعَ نُوحٍ إِنَّهُ كَانَ عَبْدًا شَكُورًا‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "...And to Dāwūd (David) We gave the Zabūr (Psalms) ." (V.<qref chapter="17" verses="55">17:55</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="17" verses="55">{‏وَآتَيْنَا دَاوُدَ زَبُورًا‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: "Say (O Muḥammad pbuh): 'Call upon those besides Him whom you pretend (to be gods)..." (V.<qref chapter="17" verses="56">17:56</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="17" verses="56">{‏قُلِ ادْعُوا الَّذِينَ زَعَمْتُمْ مِنْ دُونِهِ فَلاَ يَمْلِكُونَ كَشْفَ الضُّرِّ عَنْكُمْ وَلاَ تَحْوِيلاً‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "Those whom they call upon [like 'Isa (Jesus) the son of Maryam (Mary), 'Uzair (Ezra) angels, etc.] desire (for themselves) means of access to their Lord (Allah)..." (V.<qref chapter="17" verses="57">17:57</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="17" verses="2">{‏أُولَئِكَ الَّذِينَ يَدْعُونَ يَبْتَغُونَ إِلَى رَبِّهِمِ الْوَسِيلَةَ‏}</qref>‏ الآيَةَ

chapters.title: "And We made not the vision which We showed you (O Muḥammad [pbuh] as an actual eye-witness and not as a dream on the night of Al-Isrā') , but a trial for mankind..." (V.<qref chapter="17" verses="60">17:60</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="17" verses="60">{‏وَمَا جَعَلْنَا الرُّؤْيَا الَّتِي أَرَيْنَاكَ إِلاَّ فِتْنَةً لِلنَّاسِ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Most High: "Verily, the recitation of the Qur'ān in the early dawn (i.e. the morning - Fajr prayer) is ever witnessed (attended by the angels in charge of mankind of the day and the night) ." (V.<qref chapter="17" verses="78">17:78</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="17" verses="2">{‏إِنَّ قُرْآنَ الْفَجْرِ كَانَ مَشْهُودًا‏}</qref>‏
chapters.intro_arabic: قَالَ مُجَاهِدٌ: صَلاَةَ الْفَجْرِ.

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "It may be that your Lord will raise you to Maqām Mahmūd (a station of praise and glory, i.e., the honour of intercession on the Day of Resurrection) ." (V.<qref chapter="17" verses="79">17:79</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="17" verses="79">{‏عَسَى أَنْ يَبْعَثَكَ رَبُّكَ مَقَامًا مَحْمُودًا‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: "And say 'Truth (i.e., Islamic Monotheism or this Qur'ān or Jihād against polytheists) has come and Bāṭil (falsehood i.e., Satan or polytheism, etc.) has vanished...'" (V.<qref chapter="17" verses="81">17:81</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="17" verses="81">{‏وَقُلْ جَاءَ الْحَقُّ وَزَهَقَ الْبَاطِلُ إِنَّ الْبَاطِلَ كَانَ زَهُوقًا‏}</qref>‏
chapters.intro_arabic: يَزْهَقُ: يَهْلِكُ

chapters.title: "And they ask you (O Muḥammad pbuh) concerning the Rūḥ (the Spirit)..." (V.<qref chapter="17" verses="85">17:85</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="17" verses="85">{‏وَيَسْأَلُونَكَ عَنِ الرُّوحِ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: "...And offer your Salāt (prayer) neither aloud nor in a low voice..." (V.<qref chapter="17" verses="110">17:110</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="17" verses="110">{‏وَلاَ تَجْهَرْ بِصَلاَتِكَ وَلاَ تُخَافِتْ بِهَا‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: "But man is ever more quarrelsome than anything." (V.<qref chapter="18" verses="54">18:54</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏{‏وَكَانَ الإِنْسَانُ أَكْثَرَ شَىْءٍ جَدَلاً‏}‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "And (remember) when Mūsa (Moses) said to his boy-servant: 'I will not give up (travelling) until I reach the junction of the two seas or (until) I spend years and years in travelling." (V.<qref chapter="18" verses="60">18:60</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="18" verses="60">{‏وَإِذْ قَالَ مُوسَى لِفَتَاهُ لاَ أَبْرَحُ حَتَّى أَبْلُغَ مَجْمَعَ الْبَحْرَيْنِ أَوْ أَمْضِيَ حُقُبًا‏}</qref>‏
chapters.intro_arabic: زَمَانًا وَجَمْعُهُ أَحْقَابٌ.

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Most High: "But when they reached the junction of the two seas, they forgot their fish, and it took its way through the sea as in a tunnel." (V.<qref chapter="18" verses="61">18:61</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="18" verses="61">{‏فَلَمَّا بَلَغَا مَجْمَعَ بَيْنِهِمَا نَسِيَا حُوتَهُمَا فَاتَّخَذَ سَبِيلَهُ فِي الْبَحْرِ سَرَبًا‏}</qref>‏
chapters.intro_arabic: مَذْهَبًا يَسْرُبُ: يَسْلُكُ، وَمِنْهُ: {وَسَارِبٌ بِالنَّهَارِ}.

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Most High: "So, when they had passed further on (beyond that fixed place), Mūsa (Moses) said to his boy-servant, 'Bring us our morning meal; truly, we have suffered much fatigue in this, our journey... (up to) retracing their footsteps!" (V.<qref chapter="18" verses="62,63">18:62,63</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="18" verses="62">{‏فَلَمَّا جَاوَزَا قَالَ لِفَتَاهُ آتِنَا غَدَاءَنَا لَقَدْ لَقِينَا مِنْ سَفَرِنَا هَذَا نَصَبًا‏}</qref>‏ إِلَى قَوْلِهِ ‏{‏قَصَصًا}‏
chapters.intro_arabic: {صُنْعًا} عَمَلاً <qref chapter="18" verses="108">{حِوَلاً}</qref> تَحَوُّلاً {قَالَ ذَلِكَ مَا كُنَّا نَبْغِ فَارْتَدَّا عَلَى آثَارِهِمَا قَصَصًا}، {إِمْرًا} وَ{نُكْرًا} دَاهِيَةً {يَنْقَضَّ} يَنْقَاضُ كَمَا تَنْقَاضُ السِّنُّ لَتَخِذْتَ وَاتَّخَذْتَ وَاحِدٌ {رُحْمًا} مِنَ الرُّحْمِ، وَهْيَ أَشَدُّ مُبَالَغَةً مِنَ الرَّحْمَةِ، وَنَظُنُّ أَنَّهُ مِنَ الرَّحِيمِ، وَتُدْعَى مَكَّةُ أُمَّ رُحْمٍ أَيِ الرَّحْمَةُ تَنْزِلُ بِهَا.

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Most High: "Say (O Muḥammad pbuh): 'Shall We tell you the greatest losers in respect of (their) deeds?" (V.<qref chapter="18" verses="103">18:103</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="18" verses="103">{‏قُلْ هَلْ نُنَبِّئُكُمْ بِالأَخْسَرِينَ أَعْمَالاً‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allāh the Exalted: "He said: 'Do you remember when we betook ourselves to the rock." (V.<qref chapter="18" verses="63">18:63</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="18" verses="63">{‏قَالَ أَرَأَيْتَ إِذْ أَوَيْنَا إِلَى الصَّخْرَةِ‏}</qref>‏ الآيَةَ

chapters.title: "They are those who deny in the Ayāt (proofs, evidences, verses, lessons, signs, revelations, etc.) of their Lord and the Meeting with Him (in the Hereafter). So their works are in vain..." (V.<qref chapter="18" verses="105">18:105</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="18" verses="14">{‏أُولَئِكَ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا بِآيَاتِ رَبِّهِمْ وَلِقَائِهِ فَحَبِطَتْ أَعْمَالُهُمْ‏}</qref>‏ الآيَةَ

chapters.title: "But man is ever more quarrelsome than anything." (V.<qref chapter="18" verses="54">18:54</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏{‏وَكَانَ الإِنْسَانُ أَكْثَرَ شَىْءٍ جَدَلاً‏}‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "And (remember) when Mūsa (Moses) said to his boy-servant: 'I will not give up (travelling) until I reach the junction of the two seas or (until) I spend years and years in travelling." (V.<qref chapter="18" verses="60">18:60</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="18" verses="60">{‏وَإِذْ قَالَ مُوسَى لِفَتَاهُ لاَ أَبْرَحُ حَتَّى أَبْلُغَ مَجْمَعَ الْبَحْرَيْنِ أَوْ أَمْضِيَ حُقُبًا‏}</qref>‏
chapters.intro_arabic: زَمَانًا وَجَمْعُهُ أَحْقَابٌ.

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Most High: "But when they reached the junction of the two seas, they forgot their fish, and it took its way through the sea as in a tunnel." (V.<qref chapter="18" verses="61">18:61</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="18" verses="61">{‏فَلَمَّا بَلَغَا مَجْمَعَ بَيْنِهِمَا نَسِيَا حُوتَهُمَا فَاتَّخَذَ سَبِيلَهُ فِي الْبَحْرِ سَرَبًا‏}</qref>‏
chapters.intro_arabic: مَذْهَبًا يَسْرُبُ: يَسْلُكُ، وَمِنْهُ: {وَسَارِبٌ بِالنَّهَارِ}.

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Most High: "So, when they had passed further on (beyond that fixed place), Mūsa (Moses) said to his boy-servant, 'Bring us our morning meal; truly, we have suffered much fatigue in this, our journey... (up to) retracing their footsteps!" (V.<qref chapter="18" verses="62,63">18:62,63</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="18" verses="62">{‏فَلَمَّا جَاوَزَا قَالَ لِفَتَاهُ آتِنَا غَدَاءَنَا لَقَدْ لَقِينَا مِنْ سَفَرِنَا هَذَا نَصَبًا‏}</qref>‏ إِلَى قَوْلِهِ ‏{‏قَصَصًا}‏
chapters.intro_arabic: {صُنْعًا} عَمَلاً <qref chapter="18" verses="108">{حِوَلاً}</qref> تَحَوُّلاً {قَالَ ذَلِكَ مَا كُنَّا نَبْغِ فَارْتَدَّا عَلَى آثَارِهِمَا قَصَصًا}، {إِمْرًا} وَ{نُكْرًا} دَاهِيَةً {يَنْقَضَّ} يَنْقَاضُ كَمَا تَنْقَاضُ السِّنُّ لَتَخِذْتَ وَاتَّخَذْتَ وَاحِدٌ {رُحْمًا} مِنَ الرُّحْمِ، وَهْيَ أَشَدُّ مُبَالَغَةً مِنَ الرَّحْمَةِ، وَنَظُنُّ أَنَّهُ مِنَ الرَّحِيمِ، وَتُدْعَى مَكَّةُ أُمَّ رُحْمٍ أَيِ الرَّحْمَةُ تَنْزِلُ بِهَا.

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Most High: "Say (O Muḥammad pbuh): 'Shall We tell you the greatest losers in respect of (their) deeds?" (V.<qref chapter="18" verses="103">18:103</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="18" verses="103">{‏قُلْ هَلْ نُنَبِّئُكُمْ بِالأَخْسَرِينَ أَعْمَالاً‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allāh the Exalted: "He said: 'Do you remember when we betook ourselves to the rock." (V.<qref chapter="18" verses="63">18:63</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="18" verses="63">{‏قَالَ أَرَأَيْتَ إِذْ أَوَيْنَا إِلَى الصَّخْرَةِ‏}</qref>‏ الآيَةَ

chapters.title: "They are those who deny in the Ayāt (proofs, evidences, verses, lessons, signs, revelations, etc.) of their Lord and the Meeting with Him (in the Hereafter). So their works are in vain..." (V.<qref chapter="18" verses="105">18:105</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="18" verses="14">{‏أُولَئِكَ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا بِآيَاتِ رَبِّهِمْ وَلِقَائِهِ فَحَبِطَتْ أَعْمَالُهُمْ‏}</qref>‏ الآيَةَ

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "And warn them (O Muḥammad pbuh) of the Day of grief and regrets..." (V.<qref chapter="19" verses="39">19:39</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="19" verses="39">{‏وَأَنْذِرْهُمْ يَوْمَ الْحَسْرَةِ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "And we (angels) descend not except by the Command of your Lord (O Muḥammad pbuh). To Him belongs what is before us and what is behind us and what is between those two..." (V.<qref chapter="19" verses="64">19:64</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="19" verses="64">{‏وَمَا نَتَنَزَّلُ إِلاَّ بِأَمْرِ رَبِّكَ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "Have you seen him who disbelieved in Our Ayāt (this Qur'an and Muḥammad pbuh) and said: 'I shall certainly be given wealth and children?" (V.<qref chapter="19" verses="77">19:77</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="19" verses="41">{‏أَفَرَأَيْتَ الَّذِي كَفَرَ بِآيَاتِنَا وَقَالَ لأُوتَيَنَّ مَالاً وَوَلَدًا‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: "Has he known the Unseen, or has he taken a convenant from the Most Gracious (Allāh)?" (V.<qref chapter="19" verses="78">19:78</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="19" verses="41">{‏أَطَّلَعَ الْغَيْبَ أَمِ اتَّخَذَ عِنْدَ الرَّحْمَنِ عَهْدًا‏}</qref>‏ قَالَ مَوْثِقًا

chapters.title: "Nay, We shall record what he says, and We shall increase his torment (in the Hell) ." (V.<qref chapter="19" verses="79">19:79</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="19" verses="79">{‏كَلاَّ سَنَكْتُبُ مَا يَقُولُ وَنَمُدُّ لَهُ مِنَ الْعَذَابِ مَدًّا‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: "And We shall inherit from him (at his death) all that he talks of (i.e., wealth and children which Allah has bestowed upon him in this world), and he shall come to Us alone." (V.<qref chapter="19" verses="80">19:80</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ ‏<qref chapter="19" verses="80">{‏وَنَرِثُهُ مَا يَقُولُ وَيَأْتِينَا فَرْدًا‏}</qref>‏
chapters.intro_arabic: وَقَالَ ابْنُ عَبَّاسٍ: {الْجِبَالُ هَدًّا} هَدْمًا.

chapters.title: The Statement of Allāh the Exalted: "And I have chosen you for Myself." (V.<qref chapter="20" verses="41">20:41</qref>) (i.e., for My Revelation and My Message, or created you for Myself or strengthened and taught you as to how to preach My Message to My worshippers)] ."
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="20" verses="41">{‏وَاصْطَنَعْتُكَ لِنَفْسِي‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: "And indeed We revealed to Musa (Moses) (saying): 'Travel by night with 'Ibâdi (My slaves) and strike a dry path for them in the sea, fearing neither to be overtaken [by Fir'aūn (Pharaoh)], nor being afraid (of drowning in the sea).' Then Fir'aūn (Pharaoh) pursued them with his hosts, but the sea-water completely overwhelmed them and covered them up. And Fir'aun (Pharaoh) led his people astray, and he did not guide them." (V.<qref chapter="20" verses="77-79">20:77-79</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="20" verses="77-79">{‏وَلَقَدْ أَوْحَيْنَا إِلَى مُوسَى أَنْ أَسْرِ بِعِبَادِي فَاضْرِبْ لَهُمْ طَرِيقًا فِي الْبَحْرِ يَبَسًا لاَ تَخَافُ دَرَكًا وَلاَ تَخْشَى * فَأَتْبَعَهُمْ فِرْعَوْنُ بِجُنُودِهِ فَغَشِيَهُمْ مِنَ الْيَمِّ مَا غَشِيَهُمْ * وَأَضَلَّ فِرْعَوْنُ قَوْمَهُ وَمَا هَدَى‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "...So let him not get you both out of Paradise, so that you be distressed." (V.<qref chapter="20" verses="117">20:117</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="20" verses="117">{‏فَلاَ يُخْرِجَنَّكُمَا مِنَ الْجَنَّةِ فَتَشْقَى‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: "As We began the first creation, We shall repeat it. (It is) a promise binding upon Us. Truly, We shall do it." (V.<qref chapter="21" verses="104">21:104</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="21" verses="104">{‏كَمَا بَدَأْنَا أَوَّلَ خَلْقٍ نُّعِيدُهُ ۚ وَعْدًا عَلَيْنَا ۚ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Most High.: "...And you shall see mankind as in a drunken state..." (V.<qref chapter="22" verses="2">22:2</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="22" verses="2">{‏وَتَرَى النَّاسَ سُكَارَى‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: "And among mankind is he who worships Allah as it were, upon the very edge (i.e., in doubt)..." (V.<qref chapter="22" verses="11">22:11</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="22" verses="11">{‏وَمِنَ النَّاسِ مَنْ يَعْبُدُ اللَّهَ عَلَى حَرْفٍ فَإِنْ أَصَابَهُ خَيْرٌ اطْمَأَنَّ بِهِ وَإِنْ أَصَابَتْهُ فِتْنَةٌ انْقَلَبَ عَلَى وَجْهِهِ خَسِرَ الدُّنْيَا وَالآخِرَةَ‏}</qref>‏ إِلَى قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="22" verses="12">{‏ذَلِكَ هُوَ الضَّلاَلُ الْبَعِيدُ‏}</qref>‏
chapters.intro_arabic: <qref chapter="23" verses="33">{أَتْرَفْنَاهُمْ}</qref> وَسَّعْنَاهُمْ.

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "These two opponents (believers and disbelievers) dispute with each other about their Lord..." (V.<qref chapter="22" verses="19">22:19</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="22" verses="19">{‏هَذَانِ خَصْمَانِ اخْتَصَمُوا فِي رَبِّهِمْ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "And for those who accuse their wives, but have no witnesses except themselves..." (V.<qref chapter="24" verses="6">24:6</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ ‏<qref chapter="24" verses="6">{‏وَالَّذِينَ يَرْمُونَ أَزْوَاجَهُمْ وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُمْ شُهَدَاءُ إِلاَّ أَنْفُسُهُمْ فَشَهَادَةُ أَحَدِهِمْ أَرْبَعُ شَهَادَاتٍ بِاللَّهِ إِنَّهُ لَمِنَ الصَّادِقِينَ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: "And the fifth (testimony should be) the invoking of the Curse of Allah on him if he is of those who tell a lie (against her) ." (V.<qref chapter="24" verses="7">24:7</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="24" verses="7">{‏وَالْخَامِسَةُ أَنَّ لَعْنَةَ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ إِنْ كَانَ مِنَ الْكَاذِبِينَ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: "But it shall avert the punishment (of stoning to death) from her..." (V.<qref chapter="24" verses="8">24:8</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="24" verses="8">{‏وَيَدْرَأُ عَنْهَا الْعَذَابَ أَنْ تَشْهَدَ أَرْبَعَ شَهَادَاتٍ بِاللَّهِ إِنَّهُ لَمِنَ الْكَاذِبِينَ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "And the fifth (testimony) should be that the Wrath of Allah be upon her if he (her husband) speaks the truth." (V.<qref chapter="24" verses="9">24:9</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="24" verses="9">{‏وَالْخَامِسَةُ أَنَّ غَضَبَ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهَا إِنْ كَانَ مِنَ الصَّادِقِينَ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "Verily! Those who brought forth the slander (against 'Aishah [May Allah be pleased with her] the wife of the Prophet pbuh) are a group among you." (V.<qref chapter="24" verses="11">24:11</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="24" verses="11">{‏إِنَّ الَّذِينَ جَاءُوا بِالإِفْكِ عُصْبَةٌ مِنْكُمْ لاَ تَحْسِبُوهُ شَرًّا لَكُمْ بَلْ هُوَ خَيْرٌ لَكُمْ لِكُلِّ امْرِئٍ مِنْهُمْ مَا اكْتَسَبَ مِنَ الإِثْمِ وَالَّذِي تَوَلَّى كِبْرَهُ مِنْهُمْ لَهُ عَذَابٌ عَظِيمٌ‏}</qref>‏ أَفَّاكٌ كَذَّابٌ‏.‏

chapters.title: "Why then did not the believers, men and women, when you heard it (the slander) think good of their own people and say: 'This (charge) is an obvious lie... (up to) ... Then with Allah they are the liars." (V.<qref chapter="24" verses="12-13">24: 12-13</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="24" verses="12">{‏لَوْلاَ إِذْ سَمِعْتُمُوهُ ظَنَّ الْمُؤْمِنُونَ، وَالْمُؤْمِنَاتُ، بِأَنْفُسِهِمْ خَيْرًا وَقَالُوا هَذَا إِفْكٌ مُبِينٌ. لَّوْلَا جَاءُوا عَلَيْهِ بِأَرْبَعَةِ شُهَدَاءَ ۚ فَإِذْ لَمْ يَأْتُوا بِالشُّهَدَاءِ فَأُولَٰئِكَ عِندَ اللَّهِ هُمُ الْكَاذِبُونَ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Most High: "Had it not been for the Grace of Allah and His Mercy unto you in this world and in the Hereafter, a great torment would have touched you for that whereof you had spoken." (V.<qref chapter="24" verses="14">24:14</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="24" verses="14">{‏وَلَوْلاَ فَضْلُ اللَّهِ عَلَيْكُمْ وَرَحْمَتُهُ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالآخِرَةِ لَمَسَّكُمْ فِيمَا أَفَضْتُمْ فِيهِ عَذَابٌ عَظِيمٌ‏}</qref>‏
chapters.intro_arabic: وَقَالَ مُجَاهِدٌ: <qref chapter="24" verses="15">{تَلَقَّوْنَهُ}</qref> يَرْوِيهِ بَعْضُكُمْ عَنْ بَعْضٍ، {تُفِيضُونَ} تَقُولُونَ.

chapters.title: "When you were propagating it with your tongues, and uttering with your mouths that whereof you had no knowledge..." (V.<qref chapter="24" verses="15">24:15</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="24" verses="15">{‏إِذْ تَلَقَّوْنَهُ بِأَلْسِنَتِكُمْ وَتَقُولُونَ بِأَفْوَاهِكُمْ مَا لَيْسَ لَكُمْ بِهِ عِلْمٌ وَتَحْسِبُونَهُ هَيِّنًا وَهْوَ عِنْدَ اللَّهِ عَظِيمٌ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: "And why did you not, when you heard it, say: It is not right for us to speak of this..." (V.<qref chapter="24" verses="16">24:16</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="24" verses="16">{‏وَلَوْلاَ إِذْ سَمِعْتُمُوهُ قُلْتُمْ، مَا يَكُونُ لَنَا أَنْ نَتَكَلَّمَ، بِهَذَا سُبْحَانَكَ هَذَا بُهْتَانٌ عَظِيمٌ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "And warns you not to repeat the like of it, forever." (V.<qref chapter="24" verses="17">24:17</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="24" verses="17">{‏يَعِظُكُمُ اللَّهُ أَنْ تَعُودُوا لِمِثْلِهِ أَبَدًا‏}</qref>‏ الآيَةَ

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah: "And Allāh makes the Ayāt (proofs, evidences, verses, lessons, signs, revelations, etc.) plain to you. And Allah is All-Knowing, All-Wise." (V.<qref chapter="24" verses="18">24:18</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="24" verses="18">{‏وَيُبَيِّنُ اللَّهُ لَكُمُ الآيَاتِ وَاللَّهُ عَلِيمٌ حَكِيمٌ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: "Verily, those who like that (the crime of) illegal sexual intercourse should be propagated about those who believe... (up to) ... and that Allah is full of kindness, Most Merciful." (V.<qref chapter="24" verses="19,20">24:19,20</qref>) "And let not those among you who are blessed with graces and wealth swear not to give (any sort of help) to their kinsmen, Al-Masākīn (the poor)... (up to) ... And Allah is Oft-Forgiving, Most Merciful." (V.<qref chapter="24" verses="22">24:22</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="24" verses="19-20">{‏إِنَّ الَّذِينَ يُحِبُّونَ أَنْ تَشِيعَ الْفَاحِشَةُ فِي الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا لَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالآخِرَةِ وَاللَّهُ يَعْلَمُ وَأَنْتُمْ لاَ تَعْلَمُونَ * وَلَوْلاَ فَضْلُ اللَّهِ عَلَيْكُمْ وَرَحْمَتُهُ وَأَنَّ اللَّهَ رَءُوفٌ رَحِيمٌ‏}</qref>‏ <qref chapter="24" verses="22">‏{‏وَلاَ يَأْتَلِ أُولُو الْفَضْلِ مِنْكُمْ وَالسَّعَةِ أَنْ يُؤْتُوا أُولِي الْقُرْبَى وَالْمَسَاكِينَ وَالْمُهَاجِرِينَ فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ وَلْيَعْفُوا وَلْيَصْفَحُوا أَلاَ تُحِبُّونَ أَنْ يَغْفِرَ اللَّهُ لَكُمْ وَاللَّهُ غَفُورٌ رَحِيمٌ‏}‏‏</qref>.‏

chapters.title: "... and to draw their veils all over their Juyubihinna (i.e., their bodies, faces, necks and bosoms)..." (V.<qref chapter="24" verses="31">24:31</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="24" verses="31">{‏وَلْيَضْرِبْنَ بِخُمُرِهِنَّ عَلَى جُيُوبِهِنَّ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Most High: "Those who will be gathered to Hell (prone) on their faces..." (V.<qref chapter="25" verses="34">25:34</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="25" verses="18">{‏الَّذِينَ يُحْشَرُونَ عَلَى وُجُوهِهِمْ إِلَى جَهَنَّمَ أُولَئِكَ شَرٌّ مَكَانًا وَأَضَلُّ سَبِيلاً‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "And those who invoke not any other ilāh (God) along with Allah, nor kill such person..." (V.<qref chapter="25" verses="68">25:68</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="25" verses="68">{‏وَالَّذِينَ لاَ يَدْعُونَ مَعَ اللَّهِ إِلَهًا آخَرَ وَلاَ يَقْتُلُونَ النَّفْسَ الَّتِي حَرَّمَ اللَّهُ إِلاَّ بِالْحَقِّ وَلاَ يَزْنُونَ وَمَنْ يَفْعَلْ ذَلِكَ يَلْقَ أَثَامًا‏}</qref>‏ الْعُقُوبَةَ

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "The torment will be doubled to him on the Day of Resurrection, and he will abide therein in disgrace." (V.<qref chapter="25" verses="69">25:69</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="25" verses="69">{‏يُضَاعَفْ لَهُ الْعَذَابُ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ وَيَخْلُدْ فِيهِ مُهَانًا‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: "Except those who repent and believe (in the Islamic Monotheism) and do righteous deeds, for those, Allah will change their sins into good deeds, and Allah is Oft-Forgiving, Most Merciful." (V.<qref chapter="25" verses="70">25:70</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب <qref chapter="25" verses="70">‏{‏إِلاَّ مَنْ تَابَ وَآمَنَ وَعَمِلَ عَمَلاً صَالِحًا فَأُولَئِكَ يُبَدِّلُ اللَّهُ سَيِّئَاتِهِمْ حَسَنَاتٍ وَكَانَ اللَّهُ غَفُورًا رَحِيمًا‏}‏</qref>

chapters.title: . "... So the torment will be yours for ever" (V.<qref chapter="25" verses="77">25:77</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="25" verses="77">{‏فَسَوْفَ يَكُونُ لِزَامًا‏}</qref>‏ هَلَكَةً

chapters.title: "And disgrace me not on the day when (all the creatures) will be resurrected." (V.<qref chapter="26" verses="87">26:87</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="26" verses="87">{‏وَلاَ تُخْزِنِي يَوْمَ يُبْعَثُونَ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: "And warn your tribe (O Muḥammad pbuh) of near kindred. And be kind and humble to the believers who follow you.. ." (V.<qref chapter="26" verses="214-215">26:214-215</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="26" verses="214-215">{‏وَأَنْذِرْ عَشِيرَتَكَ الأَقْرَبِينَ * وَاخْفِضْ جَنَاحَكَ‏}</qref>‏ أَلِنْ جَانِبَكَ

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "Verily! You (O Muḥammad pbuh) guide not whom you like, but Allah guides whom He wills..." (V.<qref chapter="28" verses="56">28:56</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="28" verses="56">{‏إِنَّكَ لاَ تَهْدِي مَنْ أَحْبَبْتَ وَلَكِنَّ اللَّهَ يَهْدِي مَنْ يَشَاءُ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: "Verily, He Who has given you (O Muḥammad pbuh) the Qur'an..." (V.<qref chapter="28" verses="85">28:85</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="28" verses="85">{‏إِنَّ الَّذِي فَرَضَ عَلَيْكَ الْقُرْآنَ‏}</qref>‏ الآيَةَ

chapters.title: Allah's Statement: "...No change let there be in Khalq-illāh (i.e., the religion of Allāh - Islamic Monotheism)..." (V.<qref chapter="30" verses="30">30:30</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="30" verses="30">{‏لاَ تَبْدِيلَ لِخَلْقِ اللَّهِ‏}</qref>‏ لِدِينِ اللَّهِ
chapters.intro_arabic: {خَلْقُ الأَوَّلِينَ} دِينُ الأَوَّلِينَ. وَالْفِطْرَةُ الإِسْلاَمُ.

chapters.title: "... Join not in worship others with Allah. Verily! Joining others in worship with Allah is a great Ẓulm (wrong) indeed." (V.<qref chapter="31" verses="13">31:13</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب <qref chapter="31" verses="13">‏{‏لاَ تُشْرِكْ بِاللَّهِ إِنَّ الشِّرْكَ لَظُلْمٌ عَظِيمٌ‏}‏</qref>

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "Verily, Allah! With Him (Alone) is the knowledge of the Hour..." (V.<qref chapter="31" verses="34">31:34</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="31" verses="34">{‏إِنَّ اللَّهَ عِنْدَهُ عِلْمُ السَّاعَةِ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "No person knows what is kept hidden for them of joy..." (V.<qref chapter="32" verses="17">32:17</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="32" verses="17">{‏فَلاَ تَعْلَمُ نَفْسٌ مَا أُخْفِيَ لَهُمْ‏ مِّن قُرَّةِ أَعْيُنٍ}</qref>‏
باب

chapters.title: "Call them (adopted sons) by (the names of) their fathers. That is more just with Allah..." (V.<qref chapter="33" verses="5">33:5</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="33" verses="5">{‏ادْعُوهُمْ لآبَائِهِمْ هُوَ أَقْسَطُ عِندَ اللَّهِ ۚ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: "Of them, some have fulfilled their obligations (i.e ., have been martyred) and some of them are still waiting, but they have never changed (i.e., they never proved treacherous to their covenant which they concluded with Allah) in the least." (V.<qref chapter="33" verses="23">33:23</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="33" verses="23">{‏فَمِنْهُمْ مَنْ قَضَى نَحْبَهُ وَمِنْهُمْ مَنْ يَنْتَظِرُ وَمَا بَدَّلُوا تَبْدِيلاً‏}</qref>‏
chapters.intro_arabic:
{نَحْبَهُ} عَهْدَهُ.
{أَقْطَارِهَا} جَوَانِبُهَا.
{الْفِتْنَةَ لآتَوْهَا} لأَعْطَوْهَا.

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah (the Exalted): "O Prophet! (Muḥammad pbuh)! Say to your wives: 'If you desire the life of this world and its glitter, - then come! I will make a provision for you and set you free in a handsome manner (divorce)'." (V.<qref chapter="33" verses="28">33:28</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="33" verses="28">{‏يَا أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ قُلْ لأَزْوَاجِكَ إِنْ كُنْتُنَّ تُرِدْنَ الْحَيَاةَ الدُّنْيَا وَزِينَتَهَا فَتَعَالَيْنَ أُمَتِّعْكُنَّ وَأُسَرِّحْكُنَّ سَرَاحًا جَمِيلاً‏}</qref>‏
chapters.intro_arabic:
وَقَالَ مَعْمَرٌ: التَّبَرُّجُ أَنْ تُخْرِجَ مَحَاسِنَهَا.


{سُنَّةَ اللَّهِ} اسْتَنَّهَا جَعَلَهَا.

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "But if you desire Allah and His Messenger, and the home of the Hereafter, then verily, Allah has prepared for Al-Muhsināt (good-doers) amongst you an enormous reward." (V.<qref chapter="33" verses="29">33:29</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="33" verses="29">{‏وَإِنْ كُنْتُنَّ تُرِدْنَ اللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُ وَالدَّارَ الآخِرَةَ فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ أَعَدَّ لِلْمُحْسِنَاتِ مِنْكُنَّ أَجْرًا عَظِيمًا‏}</qref>‏
chapters.intro_arabic: وَقَالَ قَتَادَةُ: <qref chapter="33" verses="34">{وَاذْكُرْنَ مَا يُتْلَى فِي بُيُوتِكُنَّ مِنْ آيَاتِ اللَّهِ وَالْحِكْمَةِ}</qref> الْقُرْآنُ وَالسُّنَّةُ.

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "And (remember) when you said to him (Zaid bin Haritha [may Allah be pleased with him] - the freed slave of the Prophet pbuh) on whom Allah has bestowed grace (by guiding him to Islam) and you (O Muḥammad pbuh too) have done favour (by manumitting him): 'Keep your wife to yourself and fear Allah.' But you did hide in yourself (i.e., what Allah has already made known to you that He will give her to you in marriage) that which Allah will make manifest, you did fear people (i.e., Muḥammad pbuh married the divorced wife of his manumitted slave) whereas Allah had a better right that you should fear Him..." (V.<qref chapter="33" verses="37">33:37</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="33" verses="37">{‏وَتُخْفِي فِي نَفْسِكَ مَا اللَّهُ مُبْدِيهِ وَتَخْشَى النَّاسَ وَاللَّهُ أَحَقُّ أَنْ تَخْشَاهُ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Most High: "You (O Muḥammad pbuh) can postpone (the turn of) whom you will of them (your wives), and you may receive whom you will. And whomsoever you desire of those whom you have set aside (her turn temporarily), it is no sin on you (to receive her again)..." (V.<qref chapter="33" verses="51">33:51</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ <qref chapter="33" verses="51">‏{‏تُرْجِئُ مَنْ تَشَاءُ مِنْهُنَّ وَتُؤْوِي إِلَيْكَ مَنْ تَشَاءُ وَمَنِ ابْتَغَيْتَ مِمَّنْ عَزَلْتَ فَلاَ جُنَاحَ عَلَيْكَ‏}‏</qref>
chapters.intro_arabic: قَالَ ابْنُ عَبَّاسٍ: {تُرْجِئُ} تُؤَخِّرُ. أَرْجِئْهُ أَخِّرْهُ.

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "...O you who believe! Enter not the Prophet's houses, except when leave is given to you for a meal... (up to) ... Verily! With Allah that shall be an enormity." (V.<qref chapter="33" verses="53">33:53</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="33" verses="53">{‏لاَ تَدْخُلُوا بُيُوتَ النَّبِيِّ إِلاَّ أَنْ يُؤْذَنَ لَكُمْ إِلَى طَعَامٍ غَيْرَ نَاظِرِينَ إِنَاهُ وَلَكِنْ إِذَا دُعِيتُمْ فَادْخُلُوا فَإِذَا طَعِمْتُمْ فَانْتَشِرُوا وَلاَ مُسْتَأْنِسِينَ لِحَدِيثٍ إِنَّ ذَلِكُمْ كَانَ يُؤْذِي النَّبِيَّ فَيَسْتَحْيِي مِنْكُمْ وَاللَّهُ لاَ يَسْتَحْيِي مِنَ الْحَقِّ وَإِذَا سَأَلْتُمُوهُنَّ مَتَاعًا فَاسْأَلُوهُنَّ مِنْ وَرَاءِ حِجَابٍ ذَلِكُمْ أَطْهَرُ لِقُلُوبِكُمْ وَقُلُوبِهِنَّ وَمَا كَانَ لَكُمْ أَنْ تُؤْذُوا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ وَلاَ أَنْ تَنْكِحُوا أَزْوَاجَهُ مِنْ بَعْدِهِ أَبَدًا إِنَّ ذَلِكُمْ كَانَ عِنْدَ اللَّهِ عَظِيمًا‏}‏</qref>
chapters.intro_arabic: يُقَالُ ‏{‏إِنَاهُ‏}‏ إِدْرَاكُهُ، أَنَى يَأْنِي أَنَاةً ‏<qref chapter="33" verses="63">{‏لَعَلَّ السَّاعَةَ تَكُونُ قَرِيبًا‏}‏</qref> إِذَا وَصَفْتَ صِفَةَ الْمُؤَنَّثِ قُلْتَ قَرِيبَةً وَإِذَا جَعَلْتَهُ ظَرْفًا وَبَدَلاً، وَلَمْ تُرِدِ الصِّفَةَ نَزَعْتَ الْهَاءَ مِنَ الْمُؤَنَّثِ، وَكَذَلِكَ لَفْظُهَا فِي الْوَاحِدِ وَالاِثْنَيْنِ وَالْجَمِيعِ لِلذَّكَرِ وَالأُنْثَى‏.‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: “Whether you reveal anything or conceal it, verily, Allah is [the] Ever All-Knower of everything... (up to) ... Verily, Allah is Ever All-Witness over everything." (V-<qref chapter="33" verses="54,55">33:54,55</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ <qref chapter="33" verses="54-55">‏{‏إِنْ تُبْدُوا شَيْئًا أَوْ تُخْفُوهُ فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ كَانَ بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍ عَلِيمًا * لاَ جُنَاحَ عَلَيْهِنَّ فِي آبَائِهِنَّ وَلاَ أَبْنَائِهِنَّ وَلاَ إِخْوَانِهِنَّ وَلاَ أَبْنَاءِ إِخْوَانِهِنَّ وَلاَ أَبْنَاءِ أَخَوَاتِهِنَّ وَلاَ نِسَائِهِنَّ وَلاَ مَا مَلَكَتْ أَيْمَانُهُنَّ وَاتَّقِينَ اللَّهَ إِنَّ اللَّهَ كَانَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَىْءٍ شَهِيدً‏}‏</qref>

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Most High: "Allah sends His Salāt (Graces, Honours, Blessings and Mercy) on the Prophet (Muḥammad pbuh) and also His angels (ask Allah to bless and forgive him)..." (V.<qref chapter="33" verses="56">33:56</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="33" verses="11">{‏إِنَّ اللَّهَ وَمَلاَئِكَتَهُ يُصَلُّونَ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا صَلُّوا عَلَيْهِ وَسَلِّمُوا تَسْلِيمًا‏}</qref>‏
chapters.intro_arabic: قَالَ أَبُو الْعَالِيَةِ صَلاَةُ اللَّهِ ثَنَاؤُهُ عَلَيْهِ عِنْدَ الْمَلاَئِكَةِ، وَصَلاَةُ الْمَلاَئِكَةِ الدُّعَاءُ‏.‏ قَالَ ابْنُ عَبَّاسٍ ‏{‏يُصَلُّونَ‏}‏ يُبَرِّكُونَ‏.‏ ‏{‏لَنُغْرِيَنَّكَ‏}‏ لَنُسَلِّطَنَّكَ‏.‏

chapters.title: "Be you not like those who annoyed Mūsa (Moses)." (V.<qref chapter="33" verses="69">33:69</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="33" verses="69">{‏لاَ تَكُونُوا كَالَّذِينَ آذَوْا مُوسَى‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: "...So much so that when fear is banished from their (angels') hearts, they (angels) say: 'What is it that your Lord has said?' They say: 'The truth. And He is the Most High, the Most Great.'" (V.<qref chapter="34" verses="23">34:23</qref>).
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="34" verses="23">{‏حَتَّى إِذَا فُزِّعَ عَنْ قُلُوبِهِمْ، قَالُوا مَاذَا قَالَ رَبُّكُمْ قَالُوا الْحَقَّ وَهُوَ الْعَلِيُّ الْكَبِيرُ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: "...He (Muḥammad pbuh) is only a warner to you in face of a severe torment." (V.<qref chapter="34" verses="46">34:46</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ <qref chapter="34" verses="46">‏{‏إِنْ هُوَ إِلاَّ نَذِيرٌ لَكُمْ بَيْنَ يَدَىْ عَذَابٍ شَدِيدٍ‏}‏</qref>

chapters.title: Allah's Statement: "And the sun runs on its fixed course for a term (appointed). That is the Decree of the All Mighty, the All-Knowing." (V.<qref chapter="36" verses="38">36:38</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="36" verses="38">{‏وَالشَّمْسُ تَجْرِي لِمُسْتَقَرٍّ لَهَا ذَلِكَ تَقْدِيرُ الْعَزِيزِ الْعَلِيمِ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "And, verily, Yūnus (Jonah) was one of the Messengers." (V.<qref chapter="37" verses="139">37:139</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="37" verses="139">{‏وَإِنَّ يُونُسَ لَمِنَ الْمُرْسَلِينَ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "He (Solomon peace be upon him) said: "My Lord! Forgive me. And bestow upon me a kingdom such as shall not belong to any other after me. Verily, You are the Bestower." (V.<qref chapter="38" verses="35">38:35</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="38" verses="35">{‏هَبْ لِي مُلْكًا لاَ يَنْبَغِي لأَحَدٍ مِنْ بَعْدِي إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ الْوَهَّابُ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "...Nor am I one of the Mutakallifūn (those who pretend and fabricate things which do not exist) ." (V.<qref chapter="38" verses="86">38:86</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="38" verses="86">{‏وَمَا أَنَا مِنَ الْمُتَكَلِّفِينَ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Most High: Say: "O 'Ibādi (My slaves) who have transgressed against themselves (by committing evil deeds and sins)! Despair not of the Mercy of Allah..." (V<qref chapter="39" verses="53">39:53</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="39" verses="53">{‏يَا عِبَادِيَ الَّذِينَ أَسْرَفُوا عَلَى أَنْفُسِهِمْ لاَ تَقْنَطُوا مِنْ رَحْمَةِ اللَّهِ إِنَّ اللَّهَ يَغْفِرُ الذُّنُوبَ جَمِيعًا إِنَّهُ هُوَ الْغَفُورُ الرَّحِيمُ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Most High: "They made not a just estimate of Allah such as is due to Him..." (V.<qref chapter="39" verses="67">39:67</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="39" verses="67">{‏وَمَا قَدَرُوا اللَّهَ حَقَّ قَدْرِهِ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Most High: "...And on the Day of Resurrection, the whole of the earth will be grasped by His Hand and the heavens will be rolled up in His Right Hand..." (V.<qref chapter="39" verses="67">39:67</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="39" verses="67">{‏وَالأَرْضُ جَمِيعًا قَبْضَتُهُ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ وَالسَّمَوَاتُ مَطْوِيَّاتٌ بِيَمِينِهِ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Most High: "And the Trumpet will be blown, and all who are in the heavens and all who are on earth will swoon away, except him whom Allah wills..." (V.<qref chapter="39" verses="68">39:68</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="39" verses="67">{‏وَنُفِخَ فِي الصُّورِ فَصَعِقَ مَنْ فِي السَّمَوَاتِ وَمَنْ فِي الأَرْضِ إِلاَّ مَنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ ثُمَّ نُفِخَ فِيهِ أُخْرَى فَإِذَا هُمْ قِيَامٌ يَنْظُرُونَ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Most High: "And you have not been hiding yourself (in the world), lest your ears, and your eyes, and your skins should testify against you..." (V.<qref chapter="41" verses="22">41:22</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="41" verses="22">{‏وَمَا كُنْتُمْ تَسْتَتِرُونَ أَنْ يَشْهَدَ عَلَيْكُمْ سَمْعُكُمْ وَلاَ أَبْصَارُكُمْ وَلاَ جُلُودُكُمْ وَلَكِنْ ظَنَنْتُمْ أَنَّ اللَّهَ لاَ يَعْلَمُ كَثِيرًا مِمَّا تَعْمَلُونَ‏}</qref>

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Most High: "And that thought of yours which you thought about your Lord, has brought you to destruction, and you have become (this Day) of those utterly lost!" (V.<qref chapter="41" verses="23">41:23</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="41" verses="23">{‏وَذَلِكُمْ ظَنُّكُمُ الَّذِي ظَنَنْتُمْ بِرَبِّكُمْ أَرْدَاكُمْ فَأَصْبَحْتُمْ مِنَ الْخَاسِرِينَ‏}</qref>

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Most High: "...Except to be kind to me for my kinship with you..." (V.<qref chapter="42" verses="23">42:23</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="42" verses="23">{‏إِلاَّ الْمَوَدَّةَ فِي الْقُرْبَى‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "And they will cry: "O Mālik (Keeper of Hell)! Let your Lord make an end of us' He will say, 'Verily, you shall abide forever.'" (V.<qref chapter="43" verses="77">43:77</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="43" verses="77">{‏وَنَادَوْا يَا مَالِكُ لِيَقْضِ عَلَيْنَا رَبُّكَ‏}</qref> الآيَةَ

chapters.title: "Shall we then (warn you not and) take away the Reminder (this Qur'an) from you, because you are a people Musrifun." (1) (V.<qref chapter="43" verses="5">43:5</qref>) (1) (Chap. 2) Musrifun: These who transgress the limits, as sinners, polytheists, idolaters, and disbelievers in the Oneness of Allah and in His Messenger Muḥammad peace be upon him.
chapters.title_arabic: بَابُ ‏<qref chapter="43" verses="5">{‏أَفَنَضْرِبُ عَنْكُمُ الذِّكْرَ صَفْحًا أَنْ كُنْتُمْ قَوْمًا مُسْرِفِينَ‏}</qref>‏ مُشْرِكِينَ‏.
chapters.intro_arabic: وَاللَّهِ لَوْ أَنَّ هَذَا الْقُرْآنَ رُفِعَ حَيْثُ رَدَّهُ أَوَائِلُ هَذِهِ الأُمَّةِ لَهَلَكُوا ‏<qref chapter="43" verses="8">{‏فَأَهْلَكْنَا أَشَدَّ مِنْهُمْ بَطْشًا وَمَضَى مَثَلُ الأَوَّلِينَ‏}</qref>‏ عُقُوبَةُ الأَوَّلِينَ ‏{‏جُزْءًا‏}‏ عِدْلاً‏.‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Most High: "Then wait you for the Day when the sky will bring forth a visible smoke." (V.<qref chapter="44" verses="10">44:10</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="44" verses="10">{‏يَوْمَ تَأْتِي السَّمَاءُ بِدُخَانٍ مُبِينٍ‏}</qref>‏
chapters.intro_arabic: قَالَ قَتَادَةُ: {فَارْتَقِبْ} فَانْتَظِرْ.

chapters.title: "Covering the people, this is a painful torment." (V.<qref chapter="44" verses="11">44:11</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="44" verses="11">{‏يَغْشَى النَّاسَ هَذَا عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Most High: "(They will say) Our Lord! Remove the torment from us, really we shall become believers!" (V.<qref chapter="44" verses="12">44:12</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="44" verses="12">{‏رَبَّنَا اكْشِفْ عَنَّا الْعَذَابَ إِنَّا مُؤْمِنُونَ‏}</qref>

chapters.title: "How can there be for them an admonition (at the time when the torment has reached them), when a Messenger explaining things clearly, has already come to them?" (V.<qref chapter="44" verses="13">44:13</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="44" verses="13">{‏أَنَّى لَهُمُ الذِّكْرَى وَقَدْ جَاءَهُمْ رَسُولٌ مُبِينٌ‏}</qref>‏
chapters.intro_arabic: الذِّكْرُ وَالذِّكْرَى وَاحِدٌ.

chapters.title: "Then they had turned away from him (Messenger Muḥammad PBUH) and said: (He is) taught (by a human being), a madman!" (V.<qref chapter="44" verses="14">44:14</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="44" verses="14">{‏ثُمَّ تَوَلَّوْا عَنْهُ وَقَالُوا مُعَلَّمٌ مَجْنُونٌ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: "On the Day when We shall seize you with the greatest seizure (punishment). Verily, We will exact retribution." (V.<qref chapter="44" verses="16">44:16</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="44" verses="16">{‏يَوْمَ نَبْطِشُ الْبَطْشَةَ الْكُبْرَى إِنَّا مُنْتَقِمُونَ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: "But he who says to his parents: Fie upon you both! Do you hold out the promise to me that I shall be raised up (again)... (up to) ... the tales of the ancient." (V.<qref chapter="46" verses="17">46:17</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="46" verses="17">{‏وَالَّذِي قَالَ لِوَالِدَيْهِ أُفٍّ لَكُمَا أَتَعِدَانِنِي أَنْ أُخْرَجَ وَقَدْ خَلَتِ الْقُرُونُ مِنْ قَبْلِي وَهُمَا يَسْتَغِيثَانِ اللَّهَ وَيْلَكَ آمِنْ إِنَّ وَعْدَ اللَّهِ حَقٌّ فَيَقُولُ مَا هَذَا إِلاَّ أَسَاطِيرُ الأَوَّلِينَ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Most High: "Then, when they saw it as a dense cloud coming towards their valleys..." (V.<qref chapter="46" verses="24">46:24</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="46" verses="24">{‏فَلَمَّا رَأَوْهُ عَارِضًا مُسْتَقْبِلَ أَوْدِيَتِهِمْ قَالُوا هَذَا عَارِضٌ مُمْطِرُنَا بَلْ هُوَ مَا اسْتَعْجَلْتُمْ بِهِ رِيحٌ فِيهَا عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ‏}</qref>‏
chapters.intro_arabic: قَالَ ابْنُ عَبَّاسٍ: {عَارِضٌ} السَّحَابُ.

chapters.title: "...And sever your ties of kinship." (V.<qref chapter="47" verses="22">47:22</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="47" verses="22">{‏وَتُقَطِّعُوا أَرْحَامَكُمْ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Most High: "Verily, We have given you (O Muḥammad pbuh) a manifest victory." (V.<qref chapter="48" verses="1">48:1</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="48" verses="1">{‏إِنَّا فَتَحْنَا لَكَ فَتْحًا مُبِينًا‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "That Allah may forgive you your sins of the past and the future and complete His Favour on you and guide you on the Straight Path." (V.<qref chapter="48" verses="2">48:2</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="48" verses="2">{‏لِيَغْفِرَ لَكَ اللَّهُ مَا تَقَدَّمَ مِنْ ذَنْبِكَ وَمَا تَأَخَّرَ وَيُتِمَّ نِعْمَتَهُ عَلَيْكَ وَيَهْدِيَكَ صِرَاطًا مُسْتَقِيمًا‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: "Verily, We have sent you (O Muḥammad pbuh) as a witness, as a bearer of glad tidings, and as a warner." (V.<qref chapter="48" verses="8">48:8</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="33" verses="11">{‏إِنَّا أَرْسَلْنَاكَ شَاهِدًا وَمُبَشِّرًا وَنَذِيرًا‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: "He it is Who sent down As-Sakīnah (tranquillity and calmness) into the hearts of the believers..." (V.<qref chapter="48" verses="4">48:4</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="48" verses="4">{‏هُوَ الَّذِي أَنْزَلَ السَّكِينَةَ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Most High: "...When they gave their Bai'a (pledge) to you (O Muḥammad pbuh) under the tree..." (V.<qref chapter="48" verses="18">48:18</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="48" verses="1">{‏إِذْ يُبَايِعُونَكَ تَحْتَ الشَّجَرَةِ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: "O you who believe! Raise not your voices above the voice of the Prophet pbuh ..." (V.<qref chapter="49" verses="2">49:2</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="49" verses="2">{‏لاَ تَرْفَعُوا أَصْوَاتَكُمْ فَوْقَ صَوْتِ النَّبِيِّ‏}</qref>‏ الآيَةَ
chapters.intro_arabic: {تَشْعُرُونَ} تَعْلَمُونَ وَمِنْهُ الشَّاعِرُ.

chapters.title: "Verily! Those who call you from behind the dwellings, most of them have no sense." (V.<qref chapter="49" verses="4">49:4</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="49" verses="4">{‏إِنَّ الَّذِينَ يُنَادُونَكَ مِنْ وَرَاءِ الْحُجُرَاتِ أَكْثَرُهُمْ لاَ يَعْقِلُونَ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah ta'ala: "And if they had patience till you could come out to them, it would have been better for them..." (V.<qref chapter="49" verses="5">49:5</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: بَابُ: {وَلَوْ أَنَّهُمْ صَبَرُوا حَتَّى تَخْرُجَ إِلَيْهِمْ لَكَانَ خَيْرًا لَهُمْ}

chapters.title: Allah's Statement: "...It (Hell) will say: 'Are there any more (to come)?" (V.<qref chapter="50" verses="30">50:30</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="50" verses="30">{‏وَتَقُولُ هَلْ مِنْ مَزِيدٍ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "...And glorify the praises of your Lord, before the rising of the sun and before (its) setting (i.e., the Fajr, Ẓuhr and 'Aṣr prayers) ." (V.<qref chapter="50" verses="39">50:39</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="50" verses="39">{‏وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ قَبْلَ طُلُوعِ الشَّمْسِ وَقَبْلَ الْغُرُوبِ‏}</qref>‏
باب
باب

chapters.title: "And was at a distance of two bows' length or (even) nearer." (V.<qref chapter="53" verses="9">53:9</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="53" verses="9">{‏فَكَانَ قَابَ قَوْسَيْنِ أَوْ أَدْنَى‏}</qref>‏ حَيْثُ الْوَتَرُ مِنَ الْقَوْسِ

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Most High: "So (Allah) revealed to His slave [Muḥammad pbuh through Jibrīl (Gabriel a.s.)] whatever He revealed." (V.<qref chapter="53" verses="10">53:10</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="53" verses="10">{‏فَأَوْحَى إِلَى عَبْدِهِ مَا أَوْحَى‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: "Indeed he (Muḥammad pbuh) did see of the Greatest Signs of his Lord (Allah)." (V.<qref chapter="53" verses="18">53:18</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="53" verses="18">{‏لَقَدْ رَأَى مِنْ آيَاتِ رَبِّهِ الْكُبْرَى‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: "Have you then considered Al-Lat and AI-'Uzza? (1) " (V.<qref chapter="53" verses="19">53:19</qref>) (1) :(Ch. 2) Lat and 'Uzza were two idols worshipped by the pagan Arabs during the Pre-Islamic Period of Ignorance.
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="53" verses="19">{‏أَفَرَأَيْتُمُ اللاَّتَ وَالْعُزَّى‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: "And Manat (another idol of the pagan Arabs) the other third." (V.<qref chapter="53" verses="20">53:20</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="53" verses="20">{‏وَمَنَاةَ الثَّالِثَةَ الأُخْرَى‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: "So, fall you down in prostration to Allah, and worship Him (Alone) ." (V.<qref chapter="53" verses="62">53:62</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="53" verses="62">{‏فَاسْجُدُوا لِلَّهِ وَاعْبُدُوا‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: "...And the moon has been cleft asunder (the people of Makkah requested Prophet Muḥammad pbuh to show them a miracle, so he showed them the splitting of the moon). And if they see a sign, they turn away..." (V.<qref chapter="54" verses="1,2">54:1,2</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="54" verses="1-2">{‏وَانْشَقَّ الْقَمَرُ * وَإِنْ يَرَوْا آيَةً يُعْرِضُوا‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: "Floating under Our Eyes, a reward for him who had been rejected! " (V.<qref chapter="54" verses="14">54:14</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="54" verses="14-15">{‏تَجْرِي بِأَعْيُنِنَا جَزَاءً لِمَنْ كَانَ كُفِرَ* وَلَقَدْ تَرَكْنَاهَا آيَةً فَهَلْ مِنْ مُدَّكِرٍ‏}</qref>‏
chapters.intro_arabic: قَالَ قَتَادَةُ أَبْقَى اللَّهُ سَفِينَةَ نُوحٍ حَتَّى أَدْرَكَهَا أَوَائِلُ هَذِهِ الأُمَّةِ.

chapters.title: "And We have indeed made the Qur'an easy to understand and remember; then is there any one who will remember (or receive admonition)?" (V.<qref chapter="54" verses="17">54:17</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="54" verses="17">{‏وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا الْقُرْآنَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِنْ مُدَّكِرٍ‏}</qref>‏
chapters.intro_arabic: قَالَ مُجَاهِدٌ: {يَسَّرْنَا} هَوَّنَّا قِرَاءَتَهُ.

chapters.title: "... As if they were uprooted stems of date-palms. Then, how (terrible) was My Torment and My Warnings?" (V.<qref chapter="54" verses="20,21">54: 20, 21</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="54" verses="20-21">{‏أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍ مُنْقَعِرٍ * فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِي وَنُذُرِ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: "... And they became like the dry stubble of a fold-builder. And indeed, We have made the Qur'an easy to understand and remember; then is there any that will remember (or receive admonition) ." (V.<qref chapter="54" verses="31,32">54:31,32</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="54" verses="31-32">{‏فَكَانُوا كَهَشِيمِ الْمُحْتَظِرِ * وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا الْقُرْآنَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِنْ مُدَّكِرٍ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: "And verily, an abiding torment seized them early in the morning. Then, taste you My Torment and My Warnings." (V.<qref chapter="54" verses="38,39">54:38,39</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="54" verses="38-39">{‏وَلَقَدْ صَبَّحَهُمْ بُكْرَةً عَذَابٌ مُسْتَقِرٌّ * فَذُوقُوا عَذَابِي وَنُذُرِ‏}</qref>

chapters.title: "And We have already destroyed your kinds, so is there any who will remember?"
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="54" verses="51">{‏وَلَقَدْ أَهْلَكْنَا أَشْيَاعَكُمْ فَهَلْ مِنْ مُدَّكِرٍ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Most High: "Their multitude will be put to flight." (V.<qref chapter="54" verses="45">54:45</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="54" verses="45">{‏سَيُهْزَمُ الْجَمْعُ وَيُوَلُّونَ الدُّبُرَ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Most High: "Nay, but the Hour is their appointed time (for their full recompense), and the Hour will be more grievous and more bitter." (V.<qref chapter="54" verses="46">54:46</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="54" verses="46">{‏بَلِ السَّاعَةُ مَوْعِدُهُمْ وَالسَّاعَةُ أَدْهَى وَأَمَرُّ‏}</qref>‏ يَعْنِي مِنَ الْمَرَارَةِ

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Most High: "And besides these two, there are two other gardens (i.e., in Paradise) ." (V.<qref chapter="55" verses="62">55:62</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="55" verses="62">{‏وَمِنْ دُونِهِمَا جَنَّتَانِ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: "Ḥūr (beautiful fair females) guarded in pavilions." (V.<qref chapter="55" verses="72">55:72</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="55" verses="72">{‏حُورٌ مَقْصُورَاتٌ فِي الْخِيَامِ‏}</qref>‏
chapters.intro_arabic:
وَقَالَ ابْنُ عَبَّاسٍ: {حُورٌ} سُودُ الْحَدَقِ.

وَقَالَ مُجَاهِدٌ: {مَقْصُورَاتٌ} مَحْبُوسَاتٌ، قُصِرَ طرفهنَّ وَأَنْفُسُهُنَّ عَلَى أَزْوَاجِهِنَّ، قَاصِرَاتٌ لاَ يَبْغِينَ غَيْرَ أَزْوَاجِهِنَّ.

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "And in shade long extended." (V.<qref chapter="56" verses="30">56:30</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="56" verses="30">{‏وَظِلٍّ مَمْدُودٍ‏}</qref>‏
باب

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "What you (O Muslims) cut down of the palm-trees (of the enemy)..." (V.<qref chapter="59" verses="5">59:5</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="59" verses="5">{‏مَا قَطَعْتُمْ مِنْ لِينَةٍ‏}</qref>‏
chapters.intro_arabic: نَخْلَةٍ مَا لَمْ تَكُنْ عَجْوَةً أَوْ بَرْنِيَّةً.

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Most High: "What Allah gave as booty (Fai') to His Messenger . . ." (V.<qref chapter="59" verses="7">59:7</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلُهُ ‏<qref chapter="59" verses="6">{‏مَا أَفَاءَ اللَّهُ عَلَى رَسُولِهِ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: "And whatsoever the Messenger (Muḥammad pbuh) gives you take it..." (V.<qref chapter="59" verses="7">59:7</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="59" verses="7">{‏وَمَا آتَاكُمُ الرَّسُولُ فَخُذُوهُ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: "And (it is also for) those who, before them, had homes (in Al-Madīna) and had adopted the Faith..." (V.<qref chapter="59" verses="9">59:9</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="59" verses="9">{‏وَالَّذِينَ تَبَوَّءُوا الدَّارَ وَالإِيمَانَ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "...And give them (emigrants) preference over themselves..." (V.<qref chapter="59" verses="9">59:9</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="59" verses="9">{‏وَيُؤْثِرُونَ عَلَى أَنْفُسِهِمْ‏}</qref>‏ الآيَةَ
chapters.intro_arabic:
الْخَصَاصَةُ الْفَاقَةُ.

{الْمُفْلِحُونَ} الْفَائِزُونَ بِالْخُلُودِ، الْفَلاَحُ الْبَقَاءُ، حَيَّ عَلَى الْفَلاَحِ عَجِّلْ.

وَقَالَ الْحَسَنُ: {حَاجَةً} حَسَدًا.

chapters.title: "(O you who believe!) Take not My enemies and your enemies (i.e., disbelievers and polytheists) as friends..." (V.<qref chapter="60" verses="1">60:1</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="60" verses="1">{‏لاَ تَتَّخِذُوا عَدُوِّي وَعَدُوَّكُمْ أَوْلِيَاءَ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah the Exalted: "...When believing women come to you as emigrants..." (V.<qref chapter="60" verses="10">60:10</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="60" verses="10">{‏إِذَا جَاءَكُمُ الْمُؤْمِنَاتُ مُهَاجِرَاتٍ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: "O Prophet! When believing women come to you to give you the Bai'a (pledge).. ." (V.<qref chapter="60" verses="12">60:12</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="60" verses="12">{‏إِذَا جَاءَكَ الْمُؤْمِنَاتُ يُبَايِعْنَكَ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: "[And (remember) when 'Isā (Jesus a.s.), son of Mary said: "O Children of Israel! I am the Messenger of Allāh unto you, confirming the Torah (which came) before me, and giving glad tidings of a Messenger to come] after me, whose name shall be Ahmad." (<qref chapter="61" verses="6">61:6</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلُهُ تَعَالَى ‏<qref chapter="61" verses="6">{‏مِنْ بَعْدِي اسْمُهُ أَحْمَدُ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah ta'ala: "And [He has sent him (Prophet Muḥammad pbuh) also to] others among them (Muslims) who have not yet joined them..." (V.<qref chapter="62" verses="3">62:3</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلُهُ ‏<qref chapter="62" verses="3">{‏وَآخَرِينَ مِنْهُمْ لَمَّا يَلْحَقُوا بِهِمْ‏}</qref>‏‏.‏ وَقَرَأَ عُمَرُ فَامْضُوا إِلَى ذِكْرِ اللَّهِ

chapters.title: "And when they see some merchandise or some amusement..." (V.<qref chapter="62" verses="11">62:11</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="62" verses="11">{‏وَإِذَا رَأَوْا تِجَارَةً‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allāh the Most High: "When the hypocrites come to you (O Muḥammad pbuh) they say: 'We bear witness that you are indeed the Messenger of Allah..." (V.<qref chapter="63" verses="1">63:1</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="63" verses="1">{‏إِذَا جَاءَكَ الْمُنَافِقُونَ قَالُوا نَشْهَدُ إِنَّكَ لَرَسُولُ اللَّهِ‏}</qref>‏ إِلَى ‏{‏لَكَاذِبُونَ‏}‏‏.‏

chapters.title: "They have made their oaths a screen (for their hypocrisy)." (1) (<qref chapter="63" verses="2">63:2</qref>) (1): (Ch. 2) "An-Nifāq": (Hypocrisy is of two types, namely: A - Hypocrisy in Belief B - Hypocrisy in deeds and actions. )
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="58" verses="16">{‏اتَّخَذُوا أَيْمَانَهُمْ جُنَّةً‏}</qref>‏ يَجْتَنُّونَ بِهَا

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah ta'ala: "That is because they believed, then disbelieved, therefore their hearts are sealed, so they understand not." (V.<qref chapter="63" verses="3">63:3</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="63" verses="3">{‏ذَلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمْ آمَنُوا ثُمَّ كَفَرُوا فَطُبِعَ عَلَى قُلُوبِهِمْ فَهُمْ لاَ يَفْقَهُونَ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: The Statement of Allāh the Most High: "When the hypocrites come to you (O Muḥammad pbuh) they say: 'We bear witness that you are indeed the Messenger of Allah..." (V.<qref chapter="63" verses="1">63:1</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="63" verses="1">{‏إِذَا جَاءَكَ الْمُنَافِقُونَ قَالُوا نَشْهَدُ إِنَّكَ لَرَسُولُ اللَّهِ‏}</qref>‏ إِلَى ‏{‏لَكَاذِبُونَ‏}‏‏.‏

chapters.title: "They have made their oaths a screen (for their hypocrisy)." (1) (<qref chapter="63" verses="2">63:2</qref>) (1): (Ch. 2) "An-Nifāq": (Hypocrisy is of two types, namely: A - Hypocrisy in Belief B - Hypocrisy in deeds and actions. )
chapters.title_arabic: باب ‏<qref chapter="58" verses="16">{‏اتَّخَذُوا أَيْمَانَهُمْ جُنَّةً‏}</qref>‏ يَجْتَنُّونَ بِهَا

chapters.title: The Statement of Allah ta'ala: "That is because they believed, then disbelieved, therefore their hearts are sealed, so they understand not." (V.<qref chapter="63" verses="3">63:3</qref>)
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَوْلِهِ ‏<qref chapter="63" verses="3">{‏ذَلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمْ آمَنُوا ثُمَّ كَفَرُوا فَطُبِعَ عَلَى قُلُوبِهِمْ فَهُمْ لاَ يَفْقَهُونَ‏}</qref>‏

chapters.title: "And when you look at them, their bodies please you, and when they speak, you listen to their words." (V.<qref chapter="63" verses="4">63:4</qref>)
